name: jpe-skills
description: Agent skill stack for submitting to the Journal of Political Economy (JPE), a University of Chicago Press top-five economics journal rooted in the Chicago price-theory tradition. Covers mechanism-driven topic selection, literature positioning, credible causal identification, structural and price-theoretic modeling, robustness, exhibits, JPE house style, AEA-standard replication packages, referee strategy, submission preflight, and R&R rebuttals. Bilingual en / zh-CN docs; Stata / R / Python templates.
